title: U.S. intelligence shows Iran retains substantial missile capabilities
content: U.S. intelligence shows Iran retains substantial missile capabilities
author: hebelehubele
title_ja: 米情報機関、イランが相当なミサイル能力を保持していることを示す

title: AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
content:
AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward
In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to
author: Runhui Huang, Jie Wu, Rui Yang
arxiv_summary: In this paper, we propose AlphaGRPO, a novel framework that applies Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to AR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) to enhance multimodal generation capabilities without an additional cold-start stage. Our approach unlocks the model's intrinsic potential to
title_ja: AlphaGRPO: 分解可能な検証可能な報酬を介したUMMにおける自己反省的なマルチモーダル生成の解放
arxiv_summary_ja: 本稿では、Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) をAR-Diffusion Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) に適用し、追加のコールドスタート段階なしでマルチモーダル生成能力を向上させる新しいフレームワーク、AlphaGRPOを提案します。私たちのアプローチは、モデルの本来の潜在能力を引き出します。

title: Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
content:
Learning, Fast and Slow: Towards LLMs That Adapt Continually
Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM
author: Rishabh Tiwari, Kusha Sareen, Lakshya A Agrawal
arxiv_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are trained for downstream tasks by updating their parameters (e.g., via RL). However, updating parameters forces them to absorb task-specific information, which can result in catastrophic forgetting and loss of plasticity. In contrast, in-context learning with fixed LLM
title_ja: 速い学習と遅い学習：継続的に適応するLLMの実現に向けて
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、パラメータを更新することで（例えば、強化学習を通じて）下流タスク向けに学習されます。しかし、パラメータを更新するとタスク固有の情報を吸収せざるを得なくなり、壊滅的忘却や可塑性の喪失を引き起こす可能性があります。対照的に、固定されたLLMを用いたインコンテキスト学習では、

title: Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Principle for Language-Model Post-Training
content:
Beyond GRPO and On-Policy Distillation: An Empirical Sparse-to-Dense Reward Principle for Language-Model Post-Training
In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often
author: Yuanda Xu, Hejian Sang, Zhengze Zhou
arxiv_summary: In settings where labeled verifiable training data is the binding constraint, each checked example should be allocated carefully. The standard practice is to use this data directly on the model that will be deployed, for example by running GRPO on the deployment student. We argue that this is often
title_ja: GRPOとオンポリシー蒸留を超えて：言語モデルの事後学習における経験的なスパースから密な報酬原則
arxiv_summary_ja: ラベル付けされた検証可能な訓練データが制約となる設定では、各検証済み例は慎重に割り当てるべきです。標準的な慣行は、このデータを展開されるモデルに直接使用することであり、例えば展開先の生徒モデルでGRPOを実行します。私たちは、これがしばしば

title: ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
content:
ToolCUA: Towards Optimal GUI-Tool Path Orchestration for Computer Use Agents
Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal executi
author: Xuhao Hu, Xi Zhang, Haiyang Xu
arxiv_summary: Computer Use Agents (CUAs) can act through both atomic GUI actions, such as click and type, and high-level tool calls, such as API-based file operations, but this hybrid action space often leaves them uncertain about when to continue with GUI actions or switch to tools, leading to suboptimal executi
title_ja: ToolCUA: コンピュータ利用エージェントのための最適なGUI-ツールパスオーケストレーションに向けて
arxiv_summary_ja: コンピュータ利用エージェント（CUA）は、クリックやタイプといったアトミックなGUIアクションと、APIベースのファイル操作といった高レベルなツール呼び出しの両方を通じて動作できますが、このハイブリッドなアクション空間では、GUIアクションを継続すべきか、ツールに切り替えるべきかについて不確実性が生じやすく、結果として最適とは言えない実行に繋がります。

title: OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Generation
content:
OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Generation
Recent advances in joint audio-video generation have been remarkable, yet real-world applications demand strong per-modality fidelity, cross-modal alignment, and fine-grained synchronization. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm, but its extension to multi-objective and multi-moda
author: Guohui Zhang, XiaoXiao Ma, Jie Huang
arxiv_summary: Recent advances in joint audio-video generation have been remarkable, yet real-world applications demand strong per-modality fidelity, cross-modal alignment, and fine-grained synchronization. Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm, but its extension to multi-objective and multi-moda
title_ja: OmniNFT: 共同オーディオ・ビデオ生成のためのモダリティごとのオムニ拡散強化学習
arxiv_summary_ja: 共同オーディオ・ビデオ生成における最近の進歩は目覚ましいものがありますが、現実世界のアプリケーションでは、各モダリティの強力な忠実性、クロスモーダルなアラインメント、およびきめ細かな同期が求められます。強化学習（RL）は有望なパラダイムを提供しますが、多目的かつマルチモーダルな

title: Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
content:
Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has enabled strong post-training gains in domains such as math and coding, though many open-ended settings rely on rubric-based rewards. We study reward hacking in rubric-based RL, where a policy is optimized against a training verifier but evaluated ag
author: Anas Mahmoud, MohammadHossein Rezaei, Zihao Wang
arxiv_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has enabled strong post-training gains in domains such as math and coding, though many open-ended settings rely on rubric-based rewards. We study reward hacking in rubric-based RL, where a policy is optimized against a training verifier but evaluated ag
title_ja: ルーブリックベース強化学習における報酬ハッキング
arxiv_summary_ja: 検証可能な報酬を用いた強化学習は、数学やコーディングなどの分野で強力な事後学習効果をもたらしていますが、多くのオープンエンドな設定ではルーブリックベースの報酬に依存しています。本研究では、ルーブリックベースRLにおける報酬ハッキングを研究します。これは、ポリシーがトレーニング用の検証器に対して最適化されるものの、評価は

title: KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
content:
KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference
We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values
author: Alireza Nadali, Patrick Cooper, Ashutosh Trivedi
arxiv_summary: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values
title_ja: KV-Fold: 長いコンテキスト推論のための1ステップKVキャッシュ再帰
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々はKV-Foldを導入します。これは、キーバリュー（KV）キャッシュをシーケンスチャンクに対する左畳み込みのアキュムレータとして扱う、シンプルでトレーニング不要な長コンテキスト推論プロトコルです。各ステップで、モデルは蓄積されたキャッシュを条件として次のチャンクを処理し、新しく生成されたキーとバリューを追加します。

title: Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning
content:
Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning
Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurre
author: Jacob Fein-Ashley, Paria Rashidinejad
arxiv_summary: Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurre
title_ja: ループを解く：言語と推論のためのアトラクターモデル
arxiv_summary_ja: ループ型Transformerは、潜在表現を繰り返し洗練することで、純粋なフィードフォワード計算に代わる有望な選択肢を提供し、言語モデリングと推論を向上させます。しかし、リカレントアーキテクチャは、訓練が不安定で、最適化と展開にコストがかかり、小さく固定された再帰に制約されます。

title: Towards Affordable Energy: A Gymnasium Environment for Electric Utility Demand-Response Programs
content:
Towards Affordable Energy: A Gymnasium Environment for Electric Utility Demand-Response Programs
Extreme weather and volatile wholesale electricity markets expose residential consumers to catastrophic financial risks, yet demand response at the distribution level remains an underutilized tool for grid flexibility and energy affordability. While a demand-response program can shield consumers by
author: Jose E. Aguilar Escamilla, Lingdong Zhou, Xiangqi Zhu

While a demand-response program can shield consumers by
title_ja: 手頃なエネルギーに向けて：電力会社デマンドレスポンスプログラムのためのGymnasium環境
arxiv_summary_ja: 異常気象と不安定な卸電力市場は、住宅消費者を壊滅的な金融リスクに晒していますが、配電レベルでのデマンドレスポンスは、グリッドの柔軟性とエネルギーの経済性を高めるための未活用のツールとして残されています。デマンドレスポンスプログラムは、消費者を保護することができますが、

title: Enabling AI-Native Mobility in 6G: A Real-World Dataset for Handover, Beam Management, and Timing Advance
content:
Enabling AI-Native Mobility in 6G: A Real-World Dataset for Handover, Beam Management, and Timing Advance
To address the issues of high interruption time and measurement report overhead under user equipment (UE) mobility especially in high speed 5G use cases the use of AI/ML techniques (AI/ML beam management and mobility procedures) have been proposed. These techniques rely heavily on data that are most
author: Mannam Veera Narayana, Rohit Singh, Deepa M. R
arxiv_summary: To address the issues of high interruption time and measurement report overhead under user equipment (UE) mobility especially in high speed 5G use cases the use of AI/ML techniques (AI/ML beam management and mobility procedures) have been proposed. These techniques rely heavily on data that are most
title_ja: 6GにおけるAIネイティブモビリティの実現：ハンドオーバー、ビーム管理、タイミングアドバンスのための実世界データセット
arxiv_summary_ja: 特に高速5Gユースケースにおけるユーザー機器（UE）モビリティ下での高い中断時間と測定レポートオーバーヘッドの問題に対処するため、AI/ML技術（AI/MLビーム管理およびモビリティ手順）の利用が提案されています。これらの技術は、ほとんどのデータに大きく依存しており、

title: Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation
content:
Pion: A Spectrum-Preserving Optimizer via Orthogonal Equivalence Transformation
We introduce Pion, a spectrum-preserving optimizer for large language model (LLM) training based on orthogonal equivalence transformation. Unlike additive optimizers such as Adam and Muon, Pion updates each weight matrix through left and right orthogonal transformations, preserving its singular valu
author: Kexuan Shi, Hanxuan Li, Zeju Qiu
arxiv_summary: We introduce Pion, a spectrum-preserving optimizer for large language model (LLM) training based on orthogonal equivalence transformation. Unlike additive optimizers such as Adam and Muon, Pion updates each weight matrix through left and right orthogonal transformations, preserving its singular valu
title_ja: Pion: 直交同値変換によるスペクトル保存型最適化手法
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、直交同値変換に基づく大規模言語モデル（LLM）トレーニングのためのスペクトル保存型最適化手法であるPionを導入します。AdamやMuonのような加算型最適化手法とは異なり、Pionは各重み行列を左右の直交変換を通じて更新し、その特異値を保存します。

title: Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
content:
Elastic Attention Cores for Scalable Vision Transformers
Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pair
author: Alan Z. Song, Yinjie Chen, Mu Nan
arxiv_summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong data-driven scaling by leveraging all-to-all self-attention. However, this flexibility incurs a computational cost that scales quadratically with image resolution, limiting ViTs in high-resolution domains. Underlying this approach is the assumption that pair
title_ja: スケーラブルなVision Transformerのための弾性注意コア
arxiv_summary_ja: Vision Transformer (ViT) は、オール・トゥ・オール自己注意を活用することで、強力なデータ駆動型スケーリングを実現します。しかし、この柔軟性は画像解像度に対して2次的に増加する計算コストを伴い、高解像度ドメインにおけるViTを制限します。このアプローチの根底には、ペア

title: Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
content:
Task-Adaptive Embedding Refinement via Test-time LLM Guidance
We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of d
author: Ariel Gera, Shir Ashury-Tahan, Gal Bloch
arxiv_summary: We explore the effectiveness of an LLM-guided query refinement paradigm for extending the usability of embedding models to challenging zero-shot search and classification tasks. Our approach refines the embedding representation of a user query using feedback from a generative LLM on a small set of d
title_ja: テスト時LLMガイダンスによるタスク適応型埋め込み精錬
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、埋め込みモデルの使いやすさを、困難なゼロショット検索および分類タスクに拡張するための、LLMガイド付きクエリ精錬パラダイムの有効性を探求します。我々のアプローチは、少数のデータに対する生成型LLMからのフィードバックを用いて、ユーザーのクエリの埋め込み表現を精錬します。

title: MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation
content:
MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation
LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes,
author: Seokwon Jung, Alexander Rubinstein, Arnas Uselis
arxiv_summary: LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes,
title_ja: MEME: 多要素・進化する記憶の評価
arxiv_summary_ja: LLMベースのエージェントは、多くのセッションにわたる情報を保存、更新、推論する必要がある永続的な環境でますます動作しています。以前のベンチマークは単一エンティティの更新のみを評価していましたが、MEMEは多要素と進化軸によって定義される全空間にわたる6つのタスクを定義しています。

title: Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
content:
Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts
Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models enable scaling language models efficiently, but training them remains challenging, as routing can collapse onto few experts and auxiliary load-balancing losses can reduce specialization. Motivated by these hurdles, we study how routing decisions in SMoEs are f
author: Sagi Ahrac, Noya Hochwald, Mor Geva
arxiv_summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models enable scaling language models efficiently, but training them remains challenging, as routing can collapse onto few experts and auxiliary load-balancing losses can reduce specialization. Motivated by these hurdles, we study how routing decisions in SMoEs are f
title_ja: ルーターはエキスパートの幾何学を学習する：スパース混合エキスパートにおける幾何学的結合
arxiv_summary_ja: スパース混合エキスパート（SMoE）モデルは、言語モデルを効率的にスケーリングすることを可能にしますが、ルーティングが少数のエキスパートに集中したり、補助的な負荷分散損失が専門性を低下させたりするため、その訓練は依然として困難です。これらの課題に動機付けられ、我々はSMoEにおけるルーティング決定がどのように行われるかを研究します。

title: LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues
content:
LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues
Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task su
author: Di Wu, Zixiang Ji, Asmi Kawatkar
arxiv_summary: Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task su
title_ja: LongMemEval-V2: 経験豊富な同僚に対するエージェントの長期記憶の評価
arxiv_summary_ja: 長期記憶は、インターフェースの利用可能性、状態の動態、ワークフロー、および繰り返される失敗モードを思い出すことが成功に不可欠な専門的なウェブ環境のエージェントにとって極めて重要です。しかし、エージェント向けの既存の記憶ベンチマークは、ほとんどがユーザー履歴、短いトレース、または下流タスクの成功に焦点を当てています。

title: Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
content:
Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs
The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked their widespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computer use applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI
author: Guinan Su, Yanwu Yang, Xueyan Li
arxiv_summary: The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked their widespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computer use applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI
title_ja: マルチストリームLLM：思考、入力、出力の並列ストリームによる言語モデルのブロック解除
arxiv_summary_ja: 言語モデル能力の継続的な向上は、コーディングやコンピューター利用アプリケーションなど、自律エージェントのドライバーとしての幅広い利用を可能にしました。しかし、これらのシステムの中核は、ChatGPTのような初期の命令チューニングモデル以降、大きく変わっていません。高度なAIでさえ、

title: TextSeal: A Localized LLM Watermark for Provenance & Distillation Protection
content:
TextSeal: A Localized LLM Watermark for Provenance & Distillation Protection
We introduce TextSeal, a state-of-the-art watermark for large language models. Building on Gumbel-max sampling, TextSeal introduces dual-key generation to restore output diversity, along with entropy-weighted scoring and multi-region localization for improved detection. It supports serving optimizat
author: Tom Sander, Hongyan Chang, Tomáš Souček
arxiv_summary: We introduce TextSeal, a state-of-the-art watermark for large language models. Building on Gumbel-max sampling, TextSeal introduces dual-key generation to restore output diversity, along with entropy-weighted scoring and multi-region localization for improved detection. It supports serving optimizat
title_ja: TextSeal: プロベナンスと蒸留保護のための局所化LLMウォーターマーク
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、大規模言語モデルのための最先端のウォーターマークであるTextSealを導入します。ガンベルマックスサンプリングに基づいて、TextSealは出力多様性を回復するためのデュアルキー生成を導入し、エントロピー重み付けスコアリングと多領域局所化により検出を改善します。これは、サービング最適化をサポートし、

title: The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
content:
The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events
Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weake
author: Gunjan, Sidahmed Benabderrahmane, Talal Rahwan
arxiv_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weake
title_ja: アルゴリズム的風刺画：危機事象におけるLLM生成政治談話の監査
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、流暢な政治テキストを大規模に生成できるため、危機や社会紛争時の合成言説に関する懸念が高まっています。既存のAIテキスト検出は、多くの場合、パープレキシティ、バースト性、トークンの不規則性といった文レベルの手がかりに焦点を当てていますが、これらのシグナルは弱まる可能性があります。

title: ORCE: Order-Aware Alignment of Verbalized Confidence in Large Language Models
content:
ORCE: Order-Aware Alignment of Verbalized Confidence in Large Language Models
Large language models (LLMs) often produce answers with high certainty even when they are incorrect, making reliable confidence estimation essential for deployment in real-world scenarios. Verbalized confidence, where models explicitly state their confidence in natural language, provides a flexible
author: Chen Li, Xiaoling Hu, Songzhu Zheng
arxiv_summary: Large language models (LLMs) often produce answers with high certainty even when they are incorrect, making reliable confidence estimation essential for deployment in real-world scenarios. Verbalized confidence, where models explicitly state their confidence in natural language, provides a flexible
title_ja: ORCE: 大規模言語モデルにおける言語化された信頼度の順序認識アライメント
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は、たとえ間違っていても高い確信度で回答を生成することが多いため、現実世界のシナリオでの展開には信頼性の高い確信度推定が不可欠です。モデルが自然言語で明示的に確信度を述べる「言語化された確信度」は、柔軟な
